name: Electric Boogaloo PvZH
description:
Crazy Dave's description: "Electric Boogaloo has the beat...and he'll use it to deliver a beat-down. Watch out when he puts a troop of Dancing Zombies on the battlefield. They'll try to tap dance on your grave"!

Electric boogaloo has ADHD and is pansexual in this au. He has tight curly ginger hair. He is 6'2 or 187.96 centimeters
creator: Desiree M
